task_completion.description: Verify the agent connected to the Playback Connection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Playback' connection status in the NinjaTrader Control Center (usually a green circle next to 'Playback' at the bottom left) or the presence of the floating Playback controller window.

task_completion.description: Verify the Playback session date is set to January 16, 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Playback controller window. The date fields or the current playback time slider should be set to January 16, 2024 (e.g., '1/16/2024').

task_completion.description: Verify a Daily chart for 'SPY' is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an open chart window. The title bar or the top-left corner of the chart area must display 'SPY' and indicate a 'Daily' or '1 Day' timeframe.

task_completion.description: Verify the Exponential Moving Average (EMA) indicator with a period of 20 is added to the chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the top-left corner of the SPY chart or the chart legend. There should be text explicitly stating 'EMA (20)' or 'EMA(20)', and an indicator line should be visible on the chart.

Look for interaction with the 'Workspaces' menu in the Control Center showing a 'Save' action, a 'Save Workspace' dialog box, or the file explorer showing the workspace file updated in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual NinjaTrader 8 GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the NinjaTrader 8 Control Center, Chart windows, and Indicator dialogs being actively clicked and configured, rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the chart displays genuine data and indicators.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart should render actual candlesticks/bars and the EMA line, indicating a real rendering engine is at work, not a static image or mocked UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the GUI by just writing a success file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen opening a text editor (like Notepad) to manually create a fake result JSON file without actually performing the NinjaTrader setup steps.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Instrument: SPY (SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust). Indicator: EMA (Exponential Moving Average) with a period of 20. Replay Date: January 16, 2024 (2024-01-16). Workspaces are saved in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces. The Playback controller is a distinct floating window that appears when connected to the Playback connection.
